summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Software Partner for Marketing Agencies website. All major features tested successfully including hero section, solutions cards, about section, contact form, footer, theme toggle, navigation, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section renders with correct title 'We Build Software You Sell It'
Hero badge shows 'Software Partner for Marketing Agencies'
Hero stats display 40+ agencies, 120+ projects, $3M+ correctly
Solutions section shows 3 cards with correct pricing and features
Productized Service card highlighted as 'Best Start' with visual emphasis
About section displays 'Your Tech Team Without the Payroll' and 4 value cards
Contact form with glassmorphism styling works and shows toast notification
Footer shows CreativeAffiliates branding and all social links (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram)
Dark/Light theme toggle dropdown functions correctly
Navigation links scroll to correct sections (Home, Solutions, Why Us, Contact)
Mobile responsiveness with hamburger menu and responsive layout
All buttons clickable and navigate properly
Contact form validation and submission with Formspree/mailto fallback
